summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy shows no signs of slowing: over $4 billion raised in the past six weeks, with heavy bets on AI (Rhoda, MatX, Nexthop) and robotics (Mind Robotics, RoboForce). Most notable is the mega-round concentration in Palo Alto and Mountain View, though San Jose and Santa Clara are holding their own with serious Series D and E closes. On the hiring front, seven local companies are actively growing while two are tightening belts—a sign of selective optimism as the sector consolidates around proven winners.
